subject: Ecology
title: Tidal Flats
description: A micro-lesson that makes Tidal Flats usable.

hook.text: Tidal flats look barren at low tide—but dig a centimeter and life explodes.

buildup.text: Worms, clams, and crustaceans pack the mud, filtering water and recycling nutrients.

discovery.text: Millions of migratory shorebirds depend on tidal flats to refuel during cross-continental flights.

twist.text: The Yellow Sea's tidal flats have lost 65% of their area to land reclamation since the 1950s.

climax.text: Losing tidal flats threatens the survival of entire migratory bird flyways.

punchline.text: Flat, muddy, and irreplaceable for global migration.

quiz.question: Why are tidal flats critical for migratory birds?
options: They provide food during long-distance flights
